title: Keep Blob storage private with RBAC, firewall, and SAS limits
description: Set container access to Private, restrict with the storage firewall and private endpoints, and prefer user-delegation SAS over account keys.
body: Use when configuring an Azure Storage account or sharing blobs. Do not set container public access to Blob/Container or share data with an account-key SAS that never expires. Actions: keep container access level Private and govern reads with RBAC data roles, enable the storage firewall to allow only known networks or a private endpoint, disable shared-key access where possible, and issue short-lived user-delegation SAS for time-bound sharing. Validation signals include the container reporting Private, HTTP requests rejected, and a SAS expiring as configured. Risk boundary: enabling public blob access or disabling the firewall is human-gated.
